if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND r.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND r.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND r.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND r.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdRefund :: selectById */ r.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , cla.member_nm AS claim_nm , cd_rt.code_label AS refund_type_cd_nm , cd_rs.code_label AS refund_status_cd_nm , cd_cf.code_label AS fault_type_cd_nm FROM od_refund r LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = r.site_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = r.order_id LEFT JOIN od_claim cla ON cla.claim_id = r.claim_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rt ON cd_rt.code_grp = 'REFUND_TYPE' AND cd_rt.code_value = r.refund_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REFUND_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = r.refund_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cf ON cd_cf.code_grp = 'CLAIM_FAULT' AND cd_cf.code_value = r.fault_type_cd WHERE r.refund_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdRefund :: selectList */ r.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , cla.member_nm AS claim_nm , cd_rt.code_label AS refund_type_cd_nm , cd_rs.code_label AS refund_status_cd_nm , cd_cf.code_label AS fault_type_cd_nm FROM od_refund r LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = r.site_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = r.order_id LEFT JOIN od_claim cla ON cla.claim_id = r.claim_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rt ON cd_rt.code_grp = 'REFUND_TYPE' AND cd_rt.code_value = r.refund_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REFUND_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = r.refund_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cf ON cd_cf.code_grp = 'CLAIM_FAULT' AND cd_cf.code_value = r.fault_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdRefund :: selectPageList */ r.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , cla.member_nm AS claim_nm , cd_rt.code_label AS refund_type_cd_nm , cd_rs.code_label AS refund_status_cd_nm , cd_cf.code_label AS fault_type_cd_nm FROM od_refund r LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = r.site_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = r.order_id LEFT JOIN od_claim cla ON cla.claim_id = r.claim_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rt ON cd_rt.code_grp = 'REFUND_TYPE' AND cd_rt.code_value = r.refund_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REFUND_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = r.refund_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cf ON cd_cf.code_grp = 'CLAIM_FAULT' AND cd_cf.code_value = r.fault_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(r.*) /* base.ec.od :: OdRefund :: selectPageCount */ FROM od_refund r
